title: capsicum annuum var. nigrum
intro: Capsicum annuum var. nigrum, also known as black pepper, is a variety of the capsicum annuum plant, which belongs to the nightshade family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of black pepper include improved digestion, reduced nausea and vomiting, and enhanced nutrient absorption. In herbal preparations, black pepper is often used as a spice or added to teas, tinctures, and infusions to aid in the bioavailability of other herbs and nutrients.
